mature_solution_alignment.applied_rule: Use source/chunk identity, transformation/filter semantics, and hash evidence before reusing an existing embedding cache.
Keep record-manager style source tracking so stale index state is detectable.
Validate persisted vector-index/cache metadata before trusting it for retrieval evaluation.

recommendation: At least one runtime root has an effective dense corpus matching an embedding manifest; rerun canary only with that exact root/filter/config.

filter_semantics.rule: Drop only chunks rejected by inspect_chunk().is_oversize hard max char/token guard.

materials_preview.relative_path: 张亮-2012-中厚板激光多层焊温度场与应力应变场的数值模拟_6902767b.jsonl

runtime_loader_semantics.dense_embedding_behavior: Before ChunkVectorStore.build, eval filters only chunks rejected by chunk_size_guard.inspect_chunk hard max limits.
runtime_loader_semantics.hash_behavior: Use runtime chunk order without sorting or deduplication for cache manifest comparison.
runtime_loader_semantics.legacy_behavior: Then load sorted root *.json files; skip *_chunks.json when a same-name v2 project already exists.
runtime_loader_semantics.v2_behavior: Load sorted project directories containing manifest.json and append material JSONL rows in manifest order.

selected_canary_runtime_source.inference: The eval runtime defaults to this relative path when canary30 is run from the repository root.
